caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a red bow tie, sits in a recording studio. He wears a distinctive, tall, grey spiked wig and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photos and a clothing rack featuring a yellow garment with the text "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are visible on both sides of the man. Across the frames, the man remains seated and relatively still, maintaining a serious facial expression while looking slightly off-camera. There is very little movement between the frames, as he continues to listen or prepare to speak in the studio setting.
